sections.paragraph:
ζέω ptc. ζέων (lit. ‘boil, seethe’ Hom.+; GDI p. 1034 no. 3 [Crete, II b.c.] religious regulation καταχέαι τινὶ ὕδωρ ζέον; pap; Job 32:19; Jos., Bell. 3, 271, Ant. 13, 345; Ath.) fig. of emotions, anger, love, eagerness to do good or evil, to be stirred up emotionally, be enthusiastic/excited/on fire (Trag.; Pla., Rep. 440c; Chariton 1, 5, 1; Plut., Mor. 1088 f; 4 Macc 18:20; Philo, Mos. 2, 280) ζέων τῷ πνεύματι of Apollos before he became a full-fledged member of the Christian community with burning zeal Ac 18:25 (cp. Eunap. p. 82 ζέοντος δαίμονος, i.e. of the orator.—S. also HPreisker, ZNW 30, ’31, 301–4; RStrelan, Paul, Artemis, and the Jews in Ephesus: BZNW 80, ’96, 216–29). The admonition to Christians to be τῷ πνεύματι ζέοντες Ro 12:11 directs them to maintain the spiritual glow (Moffatt).—B. 676. Straub 20. DELG. M-M. TW.

ptc. ptc. = participle

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

GDI GDI = Sammlung der griechischen Dialekt-Inschriften—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

Trag.

Trag. = writer (s) of tragedy

trag. = tragedy, writer (s) of tragedy

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Chariton Chariton , scriptor eroticus (writer of romances) I–II a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Eunap Eunap , IV–V a.d.—List 5

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

BZNW BZNW = Beihefte zur Zeitschr. für die neutestamentliche Wissenschaft—List 6

Moffatt Moffatt , s. Mft.—List 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

Straub Straub = WS., Die Bildersprache des Apostels Paulus—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 426
